title: Lura Tranor
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image= |name=Lura Tranor |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] (13:5:22 GrS), [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]{{InsiderCite|79|Death in the Catacombs}} |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters= |apprentices=[[Jyl Somtay]] }} {{Quote|Actually, I'm just as glad Master Anakin ''isn't'' here. I mean, I'm sure we'll ''escape'', but—''"
"''I lost ''my'' Master on Geonosis. I know how you ''feel'', Ahsoka.|Ahsoka Tano and Jyl Somtay|''[[The Clone Wars: The Starcrusher Trap]]''}} '''Lura Tranor''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. ==Biography== A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Lura Tranor was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] by the time of the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. Selecting the young [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] [[Jyl Somtay]] as her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], the Master-Padawan duo trained together for several years until Somtay achieved the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. At the height of the Separatist Crisis, the tensions between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] came to a head on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] with the arrest and trial of Jedi [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]. When [[Master of the Order/Legends|Master of the Order]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] formed a [[Jedi assault team/Legends|strike team]] to rescue the Jedi and senator, Jedi Somtay was away but Master Tranor answered the call. Following her fellow Jedi to the dusty world, Master Tranor helped storm the [[Petranaki arena]] and took up her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] against the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]]. Despite her bravery and skill, Master Tranor lost her life during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|bloody battle]]. ==Appearances== *{{InsiderCite|79|Death in the Catacombs}} {{1stm}} *''[[The Clone Wars: The Starcrusher Trap]]'' {{Imo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Lura Tranor |pl=Lura Tranor }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Tranor, Lura}} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Jedi assault team members]] [[Category:Post-Ruusan Jedi Masters]]
